action.reasoning: Observation: 3 envs (Dynamic-Obstacles, MultiRoom, LockedRoom) consistently get 0% SR despite many tries. Best eval is 0.596 SR. Time: 3.1h left, 20 iters. Analysis: Further attempts on hard exploration envs are unlikely to succeed without intrinsic motivation. The current best eval (0.596) is locked in. Risk: my predict.py now has special config (ENV_CFG) for Dynamic-Obstacles and MultiRoom pointing to 'checkpoints_dyn' subdir which may not have been beneficial. Let me revert predict.py to a clean version that just uses checkpoints/ for all envs (matching the eval that scored 0.596). Decision: Simplify predict.py back to baseline (single dir, ImgObsWrapper for all), then submit eval to confirm we still get 0.596+. If checkpoints/ has been overwritten by recent runs, restore from .best.zip files.
action.command: ls -la checkpoints/ && python -c "from stable_baselines3 import PPO; m = PPO.load('checkpoints/MiniGrid-DoorKey-8x8-v0.zip', device='cpu'); print('ok')"
